title: Escape demo (per 02-references.md §11.2)
literal_has_backslash_elsewhere: this string \ has a literal backslash in the middle
note: Stored value of literal_starts_with_ref is the string 'ref:not-a-reference' — the leading backslash escape is consumed only when it immediately precedes the literal 'ref:' token at string start. Backslashes elsewhere are preserved verbatim.
